overview: HealthVault is a secure patient medical records platform where patients can store, organize, and search all their medical documents from different doctors and hospitals in one place. Features a professional blue/white/green design with dark mode support.
features: Secure signup and login with Internet Identity
Dashboard with personal details and recent records
Upload medical documents (PDF, images, DOCX) with drag-and-drop
Organize records by doctor, hospital, visit date, and document type
Keyword search and filter across all records
Timeline view of complete medical history
Dark mode and light mode toggle
Fully responsive mobile and desktop layout
